tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
[Verse 1] 

[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
   I made it through the wilderness, somehow I made it through.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
   Didn't know how lost I was, until I found you.[/tab]
       
   I was beat,   incomplete,  I'd been had, I was sad and blue,
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
    But you made me feel,      yeah, you ma...de me feel[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
    shiny and new.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Like a virgin, touched for the very first time.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Like a vi...rgin, when your heart beats, next to mine.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                            
    Gonna give you all my love, boy, my fear is fading fast.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
    Been saving it all for you, 'cause only love can last.[/tab]

    You're so fine and you're mine,

    make me strong, yeah, you make me bold.
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
    Oh, your love thawed out,     yeah, your love thawed o...ut,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
    what was scared and cold.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Like a virgin, touched for the very first time.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Like a vi...rgin, when your heart beats, next to mine.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
          Oooh,       oooh,    oooh[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
    You're so fine and you're mine, I'll be yours 'till the end of time,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
    'cause you made me feel,     yeah, you ma...de me feel[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
    I've nothing to hide.  [/tab]


[Chorus]  

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Like a virgin, touched for the very first time.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Like a vi...rgin, when your heart beats, next to mine.[/tab]

repeat and fade
